long_desc: Ilsa the Head Cheerleader is here, looking totally gorgeous!
detailed_desc:
You gaze at this beauty with long, flowing blonde hair, an angelic, calming
face, firm, ample...  And a body that just screams...!  You snap out of your
daydream and notice that she is frowning at you, as she does not appreciate
people undressing her with their eyes.
